overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city. The player character navigates crosswalks and sidewalks beneath towering holographic advertisements and elevated highways, passing the distinctive 'HOテル' building in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with hotel and shops

events.description: white sedan and beige car pass through the intersection from right to left
camera begins walking forward from the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then beginning to walk forward through the intersection while observing the neon hotel sign

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: futuristic hotel building with prominent pink neon 'HOTEL' and blue 'HOテル' signage
rounded pink corner building with glass windows at street level
large vertical holographic advertisement displaying 'PASSION' with a figure
vent releasing white steam onto the sidewalk near the hotel entrance
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
tropical tree visible near the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a neon-lit intersection in a cyberpunk city at night, facing the distinctive 'HOテル' building with steam rising from a street vent. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the camera begins walking forward across the striped crosswalk, surrounded by moderate pedestrian traffic and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath hotel overhang and elevated structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the building architecture and elevated overpass
moves from open intersection into the covered area beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking forward while looking up at the architecture and elevated structures, observing the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: blue sports car parked or moving slowly along the right side of the street

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track running above the street level
large digital display showing '08' and 'BW324' text in white on black background
metal walkway or structure suspended above the street with green lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the hotel's overhang, the camera tilts up to reveal the complex layered architecture of elevated highways and walkways above. The 'HOテル' building now dominates the left side as the environment becomes more enclosed, with digital billboards and suspended platforms creating a dense urban canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath elevated highway with commercial storefronts

events.description: white delivery truck drives past in the opposite direction on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the covered street beneath the overpass, passing various storefronts and digital displays

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck driving toward the camera then passing by

entered.detail: purple neon sign displaying 'NET DREAM' text on the left side of the street
red and black transit shelter structure on the left sidewalk
large advertisement showing black and white image of hands
tall modern building with illuminated windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The walk continues beneath the elevated highway structure, passing the 'NET DREAM' billboard and various storefronts. The overpass structure now looms overhead on the left while a white delivery truck passes by on the right, and the street stretches ahead toward distant glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street intersection with crosswalk and traffic

events.description: red pickup truck waits at the intersection as pedestrians cross the street

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the intersection crosswalk, navigating between vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians
pedestrians crossing the street alongside the camera

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines at the new intersection
red traffic signal pole with pedestrian crossing indicator
ground floor commercial storefronts with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into another intersection with fresh crosswalk markings. The camera approaches and crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, while a red pickup truck waits at the traffic light. Storefronts line the left side as the journey continues through the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district, moving from an open intersection into a dense urban canopy before emerging back into the city streets. It begins at a bustling crosswalk facing the distinctive HOテル building, where steam rises from street vents as the camera advances through pedestrian traffic and holographic advertisements. As the camera moves beneath the hotel's overhang, the view tilts upward to reveal a complex layer of elevated highways and suspended platforms that enclose the environment in a digital canopy. The journey continues under the looming shadow of the overpass, passing the NET DREAM billboard and a white delivery truck before the street opens up toward distant glass skyscrapers. Finally, the camera emerges from under the highway structure to cross another neon-lit intersection, passing a red pickup truck and storefronts as it integrates back into the wider cityscape.
